user_prompt: Learning Operators in Neural Systems: Scientific diagram showing three learning paradigms. TOP ROW - Hebbian/Oja Learning: Input vector u pointing to neuron output v, weight vector w, showing PCA extraction - input cloud converging to principal eigenvector direction, equation dw/dt = vu - αv²w. MIDDLE ROW - Temporal Difference Learning: Timeline showing reward r(t), value predictions v(t) and v(t+1), TD error δ(t) = r(t) + v(t+1) - v(t) as prediction error signal, dopamine neuron firing pattern diagram. BOTTOM ROW - EM Algorithm/Generative Models: Two-layer network with visible units u (bottom) and hidden units v (top), generative model P[u|v] arrows pointing down, recognition model P[v|u] arrows pointing up, E-step and M-step cycle diagram. Professional machine learning style, clear mathematical annotations.

iterations.prompt:
Create a high-quality scientific diagram with these requirements:

VISUAL QUALITY:
- Clean white or light background (no textures or gradients)
- High contrast for readability and printing
- Professional, publication-ready appearance
- Sharp, clear lines and text
- Adequate spacing between elements to prevent crowding

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Clear, readable sans-serif fonts (Arial, Helvetica style)
- Minimum 10pt font size for all labels
- Consistent font sizes throughout
- All text horizontal or clearly readable
- No overlapping text

SCIENTIFIC STANDARDS:
- Accurate representation of concepts
- Clear labels for all components
- Include scale bars, legends, or axes where appropriate
- Use standard scientific notation and symbols
- Include units where applicable

ACCESSIBILITY:
- Colorblind-friendly color palette (use Okabe-Ito colors if using color)
- High contrast between elements
- Redundant encoding (shapes + colors, not just colors)
- Works well in grayscale

LAYOUT:
- Logical flow (left-to-right or top-to-bottom)
- Clear visual hierarchy
- Balanced composition
- Appropriate use of whitespace
- No clutter or unnecessary decorative elements

IMPORTANT - NO FIGURE NUMBERS:
- Do NOT include "Figure 1:", "Fig. 1", or any figure numbering in the image
- Do NOT add captions or titles like "Figure: ..." at the top or bottom
- Figure numbers and captions are added separately in the document/LaTeX
- The diagram should contain only the visual content itself


USER REQUEST: Learning Operators in Neural Systems: Scientific diagram showing three learning paradigms. TOP ROW - Hebbian/Oja Learning: Input vector u pointing to neuron output v, weight vector w, showing PCA extraction - input cloud converging to principal eigenvector direction, equation dw/dt = vu - αv²w. MIDDLE ROW - Temporal Difference Learning: Timeline showing reward r(t), value predictions v(t) and v(t+1), TD error δ(t) = r(t) + v(t+1) - v(t) as prediction error signal, dopamine neuron firing pattern diagram. BOTTOM ROW - EM Algorithm/Generative Models: Two-layer network with visible units u (bottom) and hidden units v (top), generative model P[u|v] arrows pointing down, recognition model P[v|u] arrows pointing up, E-step and M-step cycle diagram. Professional machine learning style, clear mathematical annotations.

Generate a publication-quality scientific diagram that meets all the guidelines above.

early_stop_reason: Quality score 7.5 meets threshold 7.5 for default
